holdings.infoBox: RWM is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The ProShares Short Russell2000 (RWM) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Russell 2000 index. The fund provides inverse exposure to a market-cap-weighted index of US small-cap companies. RWM was launched on Jan 23, 2007 and is issued by ProShares.

data.title: Volatile Market Conditions Could Drive Investors to Trade
data.text: The curious investor will naturally want to know what could be done if stocks start trending downward more persistently.

data.title: 3 Inverse ETFs to Short Small Cap Stocks
data.text: Three inverse ETFs to short small cap stocks are MYY, SBB, and RWM.

data.title: The Best Inverse ETFs of the 2020 Bear Market
data.text: The best inverse ETFs of the 2020 bear market were RWM, DOG, and HDGE.

data.title: Small-Cap Bear ETFs Awaken From Hibernation
data.text: Traders can position for further small-cap declines with these inverse ETFs that move in the opposite direction to the Russell 2000.

data.title: 3 ETFs That Rise as Small Caps Fall
data.text: The Russell 2000 tends to underperform during times of economic uncertainty. Explore these trading ideas using inverse small-cap ETFs.

data.title: 3 Inverse Small-Cap ETFs Ready to Bear Gains
data.text: Small-cap stocks have underperformed the S&P 500 since March. Short a recent Russell 2000 rally using these three inverse ETFs.
